UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Information about a user and their role.

Book.title: Book
Book.description: A book or poem in the library collection.

title.description: The title of the book or poem.

author.description: The author of the book or poem.

description.description: A detailed description of the book or poem.

categories.description: A list of categories the book belongs to.

coverImageUrl.description: URL to the cover image of the book.

publishedYear.description: The year the book was published.

viewUrl.description: URL to read the book online.

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the book (e.g., PDF/EPUB).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the record was created.
